sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَعُدِ التَّعَلُّمُ مَحْصُوراً فِي مَرْحَلَةٍ عُمْرِيَّةٍ مُعَيَّنَةٍ، بَلْ أَصْبَحَ مَفْهُومُ التَّعَلُّمِ مَدَى الْحَيَاةِ ضَرُورَةً حَتْمِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Učenje više nije ograničeno na određenu životnu dob, već je koncept cjeloživotnog učenja postao neizbježna potreba.
sentences.translationEn: Learning is no longer confined to a certain age stage; rather, the concept of lifelong learning has become an inevitable necessity.

sentences.arabic: فَفِي ظِلِّ الِانْفِجَارِ الْمَعْرِفِيِّ الَّذِي نَعِيشُهُ، يَجِبُ عَلَى الْفَرْدِ السَّعْيُ الدَّائِمُ لِتَطْوِيرِ ذَاتِهِ وَاكْتِسَابِ مَعَارِفَ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: U svjetlu eksplozije znanja u kojoj živimo, pojedinac mora stalno težiti samousavršavanju i sticanju novih znanja.
sentences.translationEn: In light of the knowledge explosion we are living in, an individual must constantly strive to develop themselves and acquire new knowledge.

sentences.arabic: تُوَفِّرُ الدَّوْرَاتُ التَّدْرِيبِيَّةُ عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ فُرَصاً لَا مَثِيلَ لَهَا لِمَنْ يَرْغَبُ فِي تَغْيِيرِ مَسَارِهِ الْمِهْنِيِّ أَوْ تَعْمِيقِ خِبْرَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Online kursevi pružaju neviđene prilike onima koji žele promijeniti svoju karijeru ili produbiti svoju stručnost.
sentences.translationEn: Online training courses provide unparalleled opportunities for those who wish to change their career path or deepen their expertise.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الشَّغَفَ بِالْمَعْرِفَةِ يَبْقَى الْجَذْوَةَ الَّتِي تَدْفَعُ الْإِنْسَانَ لِتَجَاوُزِ الْعَقَبَاتِ وَتَحْقِيقِ ذَاتِهِ فِي مُخْتَلِفِ مَيَادِينِ الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Strast za znanjem ostaje iskra koja tjera čovjeka da premosti prepreke i ostvari se u različitim životnim poljima.
sentences.translationEn: The passion for knowledge remains the spark that drives a person to overcome obstacles and achieve self-fulfillment in various fields of life.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا، يَتَحَوَّلُ الْبَحْثُ عَنِ الْحَقِيقَةِ وَالْعِلْمِ إِلَى رِحْلَةٍ مُسْتَمِرَّةٍ لَا تَنْتَهِي إِلَّا بِانْتِهَاءِ الْعُمْرِ.
sentences.translation: Tako se potraga za istinom i naukom pretvara u neprekidno putovanje koje se završava tek krajem života.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the search for truth and science turns into a continuous journey that ends only with the end of life.
